themes: what a city hides to survive

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setback words=176 beats='the {ROUTE_A_NAME} voids the {ABATEMENT} at the {HERO}'s urging with nothing set in its place; the record is honest and the dole collapses faster than any chamber can answer, and the {HERO} learns what a clean stroke costs'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=168 beats='the {HERO} pulls the opinion back to draft the provision that must go with any void; the year ends with the work unfinished but rightly ordered, and the harder opinion carried into the next {DEADLINE}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=184 beats='the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s oldest rule: never strike a standing instrument without weighing what fills the space it held; to void without provision is to mistake tidiness for justice'>>

choices.label: Withdraw the opinion and weigh the provision first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {HERO} sits with the draft opinion late into the night and feels the pull of the clean answer, the single stroke that makes the record honest, and the cold arithmetic underneath it that honesty alone does not feed anyone'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} warns that a void with no provision for the {GAP_QTY} does not conjure {RESOURCE}; it only moves the winter's hunger from the ledger to the street'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the {HERO} drafts an opinion urging the {ROUTE_A_NAME} to void the {A_BINDING} outright at the {DEADLINE}, ending the {ABATEMENT} by a single stroke'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=180 beats='the {HERO} tells {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} of the crossing before it is discovered; {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} is unsurprised, corrects the record of it, and keeps the {HERO} on, the error folded into a lesson about which lines the {CHARTER} actually holds'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='the crossing is remembered when it is useful; at the {DEADLINE} the {HERO}'s certificate carries a quiet notation of a clerk who did not keep to the {ROUTE_A_NAME}, and no chamber will second the audit again'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=196 beats='the {CHARTER} forbids a clerk of one chamber to carry another chamber's fault across the line without leave; the {HERO} has done exactly that and can still choose how to stand'>>

choices.label: Let it lie and hope the {ROUTE_C_NAME} forgets.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='on the walk back to the {ROUTE_A_NAME} the {HERO} understands the size of the breach: the {CHARTER}'s whole balance rests on each chamber airing its own faults, and a clerk who shortcuts that has weakened the thing being audited'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} receives it courteously and says only that the {ROUTE_C_NAME} knows its own numbers; the {HERO} has crossed a chamber line and feels the temperature drop'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the {HERO} takes the discrepancy to {ROUTE_C_TITLE} {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} of the {ROUTE_C_NAME} instead of keeping it within the {ROUTE_A_NAME}, reasoning the count is the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s to own'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=176 beats='the {HERO} takes the brief back unfiled and spends the year learning why the {ROUTE_A_NAME} moves slowly; the knowing deepens, the record does not change, and {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} marks the {HERO} as one who may yet be trusted with the whole of it'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=168 beats='the brief sits on the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s roll answering nothing; it is noted, shelved, and outlived by the {ABATEMENT}, and the {HERO}'s year ends as a name against an unfinished line'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=184 beats='the {ROUTE_A_NAME} does not act, it binds; a brief that names no remedy is a complaint, and a complaint the {HERO} cannot answer is a resignation of the question'>>

choices.label: Withdraw the brief and stay to learn the remedy.
Let the brief stand as a complaint on the roll.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {HERO} discovers the brief has no answer to give; naming the fault is easy and naming the remedy is the whole difficulty, and the {ROUTE_A_NAME} has spent nineteen years in precisely that gap'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} reads it without heat and asks the one question the {ROUTE_A_NAME} always asks: by what instrument would you have me act, and against whom'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='instead of the closed {CONCLAVE}, the {HERO} drafts a private brief for the {ROUTE_A_NAME} alone, laying the {A_BINDING} beside the ledgered gap'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=180 beats='the {HERO} learns that {ROUTE_A_CLERK_SURNAME}'s fall was negotiated to close the {SEASON_HARVEST} cleanly, a face for a fault with no single face; nothing is undone, but the {HERO} now reads every {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT} for the bargain inside it'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='the {HERO} files {ROUTE_A_CLERK_SURNAME}'s resignation as a finding of fault; the {SEASON_HARVEST} closes tidily, the true authorship stays unnamed, and a bookkeeper carries out the door what nineteen years of the {ROUTE_A_NAME} would not carry'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=196 beats='a resignation drafted as a {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT} is a thing the {ROUTE_A_NAME} can read as fact for all time; the {HERO} may enter it as written, or hold it back and ask what it truly finds'>>

choices.label: Hold it back and ask what it finds.
Enter it as written and close the file.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='the {HERO} asks to see {ROUTE_A_CLERK}'s resignation before it is entered, and finds it drawn not as a confession but as a {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT}, sealed like any judgment'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=178 beats='the {HERO} certifies the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT}s and writes the {ABATEMENT} into the certificate as a named standing exception, forcing the three chambers to answer it at the next {DEADLINE}; nothing is undone this year, but for the first time the fault is on the record in the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s own hand, and the {HERO}'s name stands under an honest ledger'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=174 beats='the {HERO} refuses the certificate and compels the {A_BINDING} to be argued in open session; {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME}, cornered by his own procedure, hears it; the {ABATEMENT} is not ended but it is no longer secret, and the {HERO} leaves the {ROUTE_A_NAME} having made its memory speak against itself'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=176 beats='the {DEADLINE} is convened; the {HERO} holds the whole of it and {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} asks for the certificate; the last rule is the first one: the {ROUTE_A_NAME} certifies what it can defend as true, no more and no less'>>

choices.label: Certify with the {ABATEMENT} disclosed as a standing exception.
Refuse to certify until the {A_BINDING} is heard in open {ROUTE_A_NAME}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} reads each draft and strikes only what cannot be defended, teaching by subtraction what the {ROUTE_A_NAME} will and will not say'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the {HERO} drafts through the long nights, every {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT} weighed against the ledgered gap, the {A_BINDING} last of all'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=160 beats='worn down by the deliberation, the {HERO} certifies the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT}s without exception rather than reopen the whole; the year is survived, the seal is clean, and the {ABATEMENT} passes untouched into its twentieth year under the {HERO}'s own name'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=192 beats='{DEADLINE_SIGN}; the dole is cut; {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} offers to let the {HERO} draft the {DEADLINE} certificate or step back and merely witness it'>>

choices.label: Draft the certificate and carry it to the {DEADLINE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the lesson lands cold: the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s mercy and the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s evasion are written in the same clean hand, and the {HERO} will never again read a tidy judgment without hunting for the bargain inside it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the {HERO} sees {ROUTE_A_CLERK_SURNAME} sign his own diminishment with a steady hand, a bookkeeper taking the weight of authors who will keep their names, and understands the resignation is a mercy and a lie folded into one sealed page'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} walks the {HERO} through the drafting the way a surgeon narrates a cut: which words bind, which words merely comfort, which words a later {ROUTE_A_NAME} will lean on when the truth becomes inconvenient again'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the {HERO} watches {ROUTE_A_CLERK_SURNAME}'s resignation drawn as an instrument, a fault given a face so the {SEASON_HARVEST} can close without naming its author'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=166 beats='the {CONCLAVE} has confessed the {ABATEMENT}'s age; {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} asks whether the {HERO} will help draft {ROUTE_A_CLERK_SURNAME}'s resignation or keep clear of it'>>

choices.label: Stay in and read how the {ROUTE_A_NAME} closes a fault.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='nineteen years, someone says, and no one corrects the number; the {HERO} writes it down and feels the year turn on the small violence of a fact spoken plainly for once'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the {HERO}, minuting, watches the three leads negotiate not whether to hide the fault but how to distribute the carrying of it, a bargain conducted in the practiced shorthand of people who have made it many times before'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} speaks of {RESOURCE}, {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} of counts, {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} of instruments; three chambers describing one hole and each holding a different edge of it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='the three leads sit close in a shuttered room; the {HERO} takes the minute no one will keep, and hears the {ABATEMENT} named aloud for the first time'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=184 beats='the closed {CONCLAVE} nears; {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} offers to bring the {HERO} as his clerk, or to have the {HERO} prepare the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s private position beforehand'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the pattern resolves into a chamber teaching itself to look away inside its own procedure, each generation handing the next a lighter conscience and a heavier debt'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the {HERO} finds the one renewal that still argued, forty years back, a {ROUTE_A_TITLE} who set down half a page of unease before sealing it anyway, and feels across the decades the exact shape of a compromise being born'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='each renewal is briefer than the last, the reasoning worn smooth by repetition until the final ones cite nothing but the fact of the previous, a chamber outsourcing its conscience to its own back-catalogue'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the {HERO} keeps the fault inside the chamber and reads instead how past Benches met it, tracing the renewals judgment by judgment'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=158 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} asks the {HERO} to whom the discrepancy belongs; the {ROUTE_C_NAME} keeps the count, and a clerk might carry it there'>>

choices.label: Keep it within the {ROUTE_A_NAME}, as remit requires.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the {HERO} sees how a rule meant for a scrivener's error grew, renewal by renewal, into a lid over a founding wound'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} sits the {HERO} down with the {CHARTER} itself and reads the clause the {ABATEMENT} leans on, an old provision for abating a discrepancy the record cannot resolve'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=178 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME}, seeing the {HERO} has read the renewals, does not forbid it; he asks whether the {HERO} wishes to argue the {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT} should be voided now, or to first learn what the {ROUTE_A_NAME} thinks it holds in place'>>

choices.label: First learn what it holds in place.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} answers not with denial but with a procedure: come, and I will show you how the {ROUTE_A_NAME} came to hold it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} asks {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} plainly, before the other clerks, what the abating line covers; the room stills at a question asked out loud'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=168 beats='the {HERO} copies the abating line and hides the leaf; nothing changes this year, but somewhere now the renewal exists outside the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s own keeping, waiting for a reader with more standing'>>

ending.title: A Copy Kept Against the Day

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setback words=184 beats='the {HERO} resets the {A_SEAL} and leaves the archive as found; at the {DEADLINE} {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} renews the {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT} a nineteenth time and the {HERO}, knowing, signs the certificate clean'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=160 beats='the archivist's rule is plain: a clerk may read a {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT} but may not copy a sealed instrument without the {ROUTE_A_TITLE}'s leave; the {HERO} stands over the {A_SEAL} with a blank leaf'>>

choices.label: Copy the sealed line for the record.
Reseal it and carry only what you remember.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the {HERO} works alone by a shuttered lamp, aware that the archive keeps a register of who reads what, and that this reading will be on record whatever the {HERO} does next'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='each renewal is a single sealed line abating {GAP_QTY}; nowhere is the word {RESOURCE}, nor the word missing, only the abatement of a discrepancy'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the {HERO} slips into the {A_ARCHIVE} after the lamps are trimmed; the shelved renewals run back nineteen years in three hands, {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME}'s the last'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=158 beats='the sealed {A_BINDING} lies open; the archivist's rule stands, that a clerk reads but does not copy without leave; the {HERO} may put the question to {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} in the open, or trace the renewals alone tonight'>>

choices.label: Put the question to {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} in open session.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} notices where the {HERO}'s eyes have gone; he does not cover the instrument, which is somehow worse, and waits to see what the {HERO} will do with a thing not hidden'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='the {A_SEAL} has been renewed many times, the last renewal in {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME}'s own hand; the dates run back about nineteen years, one line each {DEADLINE}, quiet as a held breath'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='sorting the day's instruments, the {HERO} finds one mis-shelved: a sealed {A_BINDING} from {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME}'s predecessor authorizing an annual abatement of the same {GAP_QTY}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} watches the {HERO} learn to distrust tidiness, and remarks that the most dangerous instruments in the archive are the ones drawn most beautifully, because beauty is what stops a reader from asking what was decided'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} spends the first weeks simply reading old {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT}s, learning the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s grammar of sealed judgments, and how a single clean line can carry a decision no one alive remembers making'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='the {DEEPSTORE} reconciliation reaches the {ROUTE_A_NAME} as a request to bind fault for the {GAP_QTY} gap; {ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} sets it aside to ripen, the way the {ROUTE_A_NAME} sets everything to ripen'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='{ROUTE_A_HEAD_SURNAME} teaches that the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s whole power is the memory of its own word; every judgment is sealed and shelved, and the chamber is bound by what it once said as surely as any citizen'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {HERO} is seated below the great Scale of the {ROUTE_A_NAME}, where {CITY} weighs disputes but never acts; {ROUTE_A_TITLE} {ROUTE_A_HEAD_NAME} presides, unhurried, and names the remit: certify the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s {ROUTE_A_INSTRUMENT}s against the ledgered facts before the {DEADLINE}'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=192 beats='the {HERO} carries the truth of the empty vault to the {DEADLINE}; the substitution is entered, the outer {WARD}s named at last, and the city forced to argue in the open whether it will feed the people it refuses to count; {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} is broken by it and does not resent the {HERO} for the breaking'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=172 beats='the {HERO} climbs the stair and reports {GAP_QTY} held; the {WARD}s are fed one more winter, the ledger stays a lie, and the {HERO} learns how mercy and complicity share a stairwell'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=180 beats='the {HERO} reports the substitution but keeps the {WARD}s out of it; the {ROUTE_B_NAME} takes the blame for a theft that was really a feeding, {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} among the fallen, and the {HERO} carries the unsaid half home like a stone'>>

ending.title: Half the Truth Up the Stair

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=158 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} lays the whole of it out and asks what the {HERO} will carry up the stair; her rule holds even here, that a keeper answers for the count he reports'>>

choices.label: Keep {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s peace and report the count as given.
Report the empty vault but not the {WARD}s.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the {HERO} stands between the empty vault below and the fed {WARD}s above and understands that every number in the {ROUTE_B_NAME}'s books is a sentence someone will serve'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='she does not order the {HERO} to silence; she lays the whole weight down and steps back, which is worse than an order, because now the choosing is honestly the {HERO}'s'>>

<<FILL role=peril words=178 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} says quietly that three Prefects before her kept this exact watch, and that every one of them learned the same lesson: the truth of the vault, spoken at the wrong moment, does not feed anyone, it only starves them faster'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='below the grate the {WARD}s go about their evening, fed and unlisted, a whole quarter of the city living on {RESOURCE} the {CENSUS} swears is sitting in the vault the {HERO} just walked'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='she leads the {HERO} up a service stair to a grate above the outer {WARD}s and names the number the {ROLL} never counts, the people {CITY} feeds without admitting they exist'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='she explains the arithmetic she has kept in her head for years: how much true {RESOURCE} the counted city needs, how much the land yields, and the fixed shortfall between the two that no season has ever closed'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='she walks the {HERO} through the lower aisles, pointing out which sacks were emptied first and how the substitution was dressed to survive an ordinary inspection from the stair'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} herself comes down, not angry, only tired, and does not pretend; she says the {RESOURCE} that should be here has gone where the {CENSUS} cannot follow it'>>

<<FILL role=peril words=192 beats='a watch-lantern turns at the stair; to be found counting the vault against orders is, by the {ROUTE_B_NAME}'s own code, to be counting against the {ROUTE_B_TITLE}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the marked sacks give under the hand like ballast; they are ballast, and sweepings, stacked to a height that reads full from the stair-head'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the {HERO} descends past the last honest sacks into the deep aisles; the smell is wrong, dry as chaff and dust, not {RESOURCE}'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='the {HERO}'s {B_WATCH_ROLL} is a monument to a count no one dares take; the {DEEPSTORE} is certified full and held, the audit clean, and the truth stays below the stair for a keeper braver than this one'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='at the {DEADLINE} the {HERO} certifies a granary defended to the last man and empty at the heart, and does not know it, which is its own kind of ending'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='the {HERO} mistakes the intensity of the guarding for the value of the guarded, and files report after report praising the {DEEPSTORE}'s security, each one another seal over the emptiness'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='not once does the {HERO} go down the lower stair; the count is guarded ferociously precisely because no one is meant to take it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the {B_WATCH_ROLL} thickens through {SEASON_HARVEST}; more keepers, more seals, more attestations that the {RESOURCE} is where it is written to be'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} sets the new watch on the {DEEPSTORE} and enters the count as the {B_VAULT_BOOK} gives it, {GAP_QTY} held below'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=168 beats='the {HERO} certifies the {DEEPSTORE} with a formal exception that its count rests on attestation, not on any weighing; it is the most honest paper anyone files this year and it still never learns what is actually below the stair'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the {HERO} cannot break the count on paper and will not walk the vault; the year ends with a formal exception noting the provenance is unproven, the nearest thing to truth that never touched the truth'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} watches the {HERO} chase the paper in circles and says, not unkindly, that some counts are held up by belief, not by {RESOURCE}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the clerks produce attestations of attestations; nowhere a weighing, only keepers swearing to what prior keepers swore'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the {HERO} refuses to certify the count on attestation alone and demands the {B_VAULT_BOOK}'s provenance, every entry sourced back to a weighing'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='the {B_VAULT_BOOK} says {GAP_QTY} held below; {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s rule for the watch is that a keeper reports the count he is given, not the count he takes; the {HERO} stands at the lower stair with the key'>>

choices.label: Break the count and walk the lower vault yourself.
Post the extra watch {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} orders and log the count as held.
Demand the {B_VAULT_BOOK}'s provenance in writing before you certify.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s extra {SEASON_HARVEST} watch settles in over the granary, more eyes on a count than any honest granary needs, and the {HERO} learns to read the size of a guard as the measure of a secret'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the keepers work the {DEEPSTORE} in shifts that never overlap at the lower door, a rota built, the {HERO} slowly sees, so that no single keeper ever accounts for the whole of what is below'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='the upper aisles are honest, fragrant, exactly as the {B_VAULT_BOOK} says; it is the lower stair, always locked, that the keepers grow quiet around'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='the {HERO} takes the {DEEPSTORE} posting, where the disputed count physically sits; keepers, seals, and a lower vault no {HERO} is encouraged to enter'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=174 beats='the {HERO} files a {WARD}-by-{WARD} reconciliation that exposes the {RESOURCE} flowing to the uncounted {WARD}s; the {B_COIN_BALANCE} can no longer hide it; {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} answers for it at the {DEADLINE} and the city is made to see whom it has been feeding in the dark'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} writes the reconciliation true, {WARD} by {WARD}, knowing whose name sits at the bottom of the honest column and choosing to sign beneath it anyway'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} does not interfere; she lets the {HERO} reach the bottom of the column alone, the way she reached it herself a long time ago'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the {HERO} sits with the two ledgers, the tidy false one and the true rough one, and understands that filing the second is not an accusation of theft but a confession of the city's real shape'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the clerk is not threatening, only weary; he has drafted honest reconciliations before and watched them softened into nothing, and he wants the {HERO} to know the cost before paying it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='a senior clerk warns that to name the flow is to name {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}, and to name {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} is to hand the {ROUTE_A_NAME} and the {ROUTE_C_NAME} a {ROUTE_B_TITLE} to blame for a fault all three chambers share'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the outer {WARD}s resolve into something the {LEVY}-book was built to hide: not delinquents but dependents, a population the city taxes as a courtesy and feeds as a necessity'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the {HERO} rebuilds each {WARD}'s true figure from the raw collection slips, going behind the balanced column to the weighings the clerks stopped copying forward years ago'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='the pattern is old and deliberate; {RESOURCE} flows out to {WARD}s the {CENSUS} barely lists, and the {LEVY}-book is balanced to make the flow invisible'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the {HERO} works the tallies {WARD} by {WARD} and finds the outer {WARD}s taxed lightly and fed heavily, a leak the {B_COIN_BALANCE} hides'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=166 beats='the {HERO} certifies the {LEVY} on the {B_COIN_BALANCE} and lets the {RESOURCE}-flow lie; the {ROUTE_B_NAME}'s books are clean, its secret intact, and the {HERO} has learned exactly how a chamber buys silence with tidiness'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} thanks the {HERO} for a clean close and means it; the {ROUTE_B_NAME} rewards the keeper who does not ask where the {RESOURCE} went'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the books are tidy, the {LEVY} certified, the flow to the outer {WARD}s untouched and unnamed beneath a balanced column'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} closes the {LEVY} on the {B_COIN_BALANCE}, the way the {ROUTE_B_NAME} always closes it, and does not chase the {RESOURCE} the coin does not track'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=168 beats='the {HERO} sees from the {LEVY} side what the {CENSUS} refuses: a fed, uncounted people at the city's edge; the truth is whole now but the choosing is not the {HERO}'s alone, and the year ends holding a question three chambers have spent nineteen years not answering'>>

ending.title: Who Eats in the Outer Wards

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} finds the {HERO} at the {WARD}-edge and does not explain herself; she only asks whether a true count would feed these people or merely name them for the winter's cut'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {HERO} understands the shape of it now from the {LEVY} side: the {ROUTE_B_NAME} feeds the uncounted and the {ROUTE_C_NAME} refuses to count them, and the gap is the shape of that refusal'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the thread runs out past the counted city to the outer {WARD}s, to lines of people the {ROLL} never names, eating {RESOURCE} the {LEVY}-book swears is elsewhere'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=172 beats='the {HERO} files a proven, partial finding that stops at the {WARD}-gate; it is honest and incomplete, names the leak without the reason, and leaves the founding wound for a bolder year'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='it is a careful, defensible document that names a leak and not a cause, a symptom and not the wound'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='the {HERO} stops at the counted city's edge, unwilling to certify what cannot be weighed, and files only the proven flow to the gate'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=196 beats='the {HERO} reports the outer {WARD} for under-{LEVY} and hands the {ROUTE_B_NAME} a tidy scapegoat; the winter's cut falls hardest on the {WARD}s already fed in secret, and the {HERO} never learns the {RESOURCE} was flowing the other way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='the {ROUTE_B_NAME} is happy to accept a clean story of a delinquent {WARD}; it is a smaller lie that protects a larger one, and it costs the poorest the most'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='the {HERO} reads the light {LEVY} as evasion and reports the outer {WARD} for under-payment, not seeing the feeding underneath the figure'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=174 beats='the {HERO} follows a single {WARD}'s {RESOURCE} out of the {LEVY}-book and into the streets; {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s rule bends here, that a keeper who traces one thread had better be ready for the whole cloth'>>

choices.label: Follow it to the outer {WARD}s and see who eats.
Stop at the {WARD}-gate and file what you can prove.
Turn back and report the {WARD} for under-{LEVY}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=176 beats='the {B_LEVY_BOOKS} show the {RESOURCE} collected against the {CENSUS}; {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s operational rule is that the {LEVY} is closed when the coin balances, whatever the {RESOURCE} does; the {HERO} holds the {WARD}-by-{WARD} tallies'>>

choices.label: Accept the {B_COIN_BALANCE} and close the {LEVY} as {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s rule allows.
Trace one {WARD}'s {RESOURCE}-flow to its end before deciding.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} looks in once, sees which books are open, and says only that the {LEVY} feeds the city and the books feed the auditors, and that the {HERO} should be careful which one it is truly serving'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the {HERO} pulls three years of {B_LEVY_BOOKS} and finds the same hand softening the same {WARD}s, a quiet competence that has been managing this seam for longer than the {HERO} has been alive'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the outer {WARD}s recur at the bottom of every page, lightly levied and heavily provisioned, a discrepancy so consistent it has plainly stopped being an error and become a policy no one will name'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='an old ledger-clerk shows the {HERO} the house style: close on the coin, footnote the {RESOURCE}, and never let the two columns be asked the same question in the same room'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the coin totals reconcile to the last measure while the {RESOURCE} totals are only ever asserted, and the {HERO} notices the {ROUTE_B_NAME} proves what it collects and merely states what it holds'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the balance is beautiful and the {RESOURCE} beneath it does not behave; the {HERO} senses a second story running under the arithmetic'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='the {HERO} takes the {B_LEVY_BOOKS}, where the {CENSUS} meets the collected {RESOURCE} in long columns balanced to the coin'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=196 beats='the {HERO} counts the {B_WAGON}s true and finds the {ROUTE_B_NAME}'s hidden distribution to the uncounted {WARD}s; the operational truth is plain from the road even when the paper hides it, and the {HERO} comes back changed by having seen the city feed its own shadow'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='the {HERO} understands the operation is not chaos but a second, hidden distribution the {ROUTE_B_NAME} runs alongside the counted one'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='{RESOURCE} is being delivered to places that do not appear on the provisioning rolls, quietly, competently, as if it were the most ordinary thing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the {HERO} rides out with the {B_WAGON}s and counts each against the {B_MANIFEST}; past the counted city the {B_MANIFEST}s thin and the {B_WAGON}s do not'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=176 beats='the {HERO} reports the off-{B_MANIFEST} deliveries as diversion and the run is suspended pending the {DEADLINE}; the paper is honest, the ledger corrected, and the outer {WARD}s go hungry through the vote; the {HERO} certifies a true book and cannot forget the arithmetic of the choice'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} does not argue; she only asks the {HERO} to ride the run once more before deciding, and to count the faces this time, not the sacks'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the {HERO} weighs the clean report against the {B_WAGON}s it will halt, and learns that the honest word and the fed child are not always on the same side'>>
<<FILL role=peril words=160 beats='a driver warns, flatly, that naming the run as theft will stop the run, and stopping the run will starve the {WARD}s before any chamber votes a remedy'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the {HERO} documents the off-{B_MANIFEST} deliveries as diversion of levied {RESOURCE} and prepares to lay them before the {DEADLINE}'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=172 beats='the {HERO} keeps the provisioning run alive and folds it into the books as an honest, named exception; no one starves and no one is deceived; the founding fault is now a line the {DEADLINE} must answer, put there by a keeper who refused both the lie and the clean cruelty'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='she tells the {HERO} it is the first time the true shape of the year will reach the {DEADLINE} without a body attached to carry the blame, and perhaps the only clean thing done in this chamber in her tenure'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} reads the exception line and, for once, looks something like relieved; a burden nineteen years carried is at last written down by someone willing to sign beneath it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='it is a keeper's compromise and the {HERO} knows it, feeding the {WARD}s and forcing the reckoning at once, refusing both the comfortable lie and the clean cruelty of a truth dropped without a remedy'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='the exception line, finished, does what nineteen years of silence never did: it makes the shortfall a fact the chambers can argue over instead of a secret they must protect'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='{ROUTE_A_CLERK}, in the days before his forced resignation, quietly checks the {HERO}'s figures against the bookkeeping he can no longer defend, and confirms them without complaint'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the {HERO} drafts and redrafts the exception through the last weeks of {SEASON_HARVEST}, testing each wording against the objection the {ROUTE_A_NAME} will raise and the objection the {ROUTE_C_NAME} will raise'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='it means inventing a form the {ROUTE_B_NAME} has never had, a line that records {RESOURCE} going to people the {ROUTE_C_NAME} does not count, without either lying about the {RESOURCE} or denying the people'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='the {HERO} keeps the {B_WAGON}s moving and begins the slow work of writing the hidden distribution into the books as a named exception, neither buried nor accused'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=184 beats='the {HERO} hides the provisioning run inside the counted books so well that no future {HERO} will find it; the {WARD}s eat, the {ABATEMENT} deepens, and the {HERO}'s skill has become the newest brick in a nineteen-year wall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {WARD}s stay fed and the secret stays kept, but now it is the {HERO}'s craftsmanship holding the lid down, not just {ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the {HERO} smooths the hidden {RESOURCE} into the counted columns until the run vanishes into ordinary provisioning, tidy and untraceable'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=172 beats='the {HERO} keeps the run alive and hands the {DEADLINE} an unsettled, honest mess rather than a false neatness; the {WARD}s are fed and the choice is placed where it belongs, with the whole {CHARTER}, and the {HERO}'s year ends having refused to be the one who decided alone'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='it is neither lie nor accusation, only a keeper handing the whole tangled truth up the chain exactly as it is, and letting the chambers own the choice'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='the {HERO} keeps the {B_WAGON}s rolling and refuses to settle the books at all, leaving the discrepancy raw and open for the {DEADLINE} to see'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=196 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s road-rule wins for now; but settling the books to protect the run means writing the off-{B_MANIFEST} {RESOURCE} into the counted columns, and the {HERO} holds the pen'>>

choices.label: Fold the hidden run into an honest exception line.
Bury the run in the counted columns to hide it entirely.
Keep the run but leave the books unsettled for the {DEADLINE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=166 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} assigns the {HERO} to ride the provisioning run to the {B_WORKS} and the outer {WARD}s; her present-tense rule governs: on the road you keep the {B_WAGON}s moving and settle the books after'>>

choices.label: Ride the run and count the {B_WAGON}s honestly against the {B_MANIFEST}.
Report the off-{B_MANIFEST} deliveries to the {DEADLINE} as diversion.
Keep the run moving and settle the books to protect it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='the drivers treat the {HERO} with the wary courtesy of men who have seen inspectors before and know the run survives only if the paperwork never quite catches the wheels'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='at a waystation the {HERO} watches {RESOURCE} unloaded to people who thank the drivers by name, a transaction so practiced and so unrecorded that it has clearly been the truest routine of the {ROUTE_B_NAME} for years'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} rides on with the discrepancy widening at every {WARD}-edge, the paper saying one city and the wheels serving another, both of them {CITY}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='then the road bends past the last counted street and the {B_MANIFEST}s thin while the {B_WAGON}s do not, and a driver tells the {HERO}, without being asked, that some deliveries are better left uncounted for everyone's sake'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the first days are ordinary, {RESOURCE} to the {B_WORKS}, {RESOURCE} to the granary gates, every {B_WAGON} matched to a line; the {HERO} almost relaxes into the rhythm of an honest job'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} says the run is where the {HERO} will actually see the shape of the year, if the {HERO} is willing to look past the paper'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the {HERO} takes the provisioning run to the {B_WORKS} and the {WARD}s, the {ROUTE_B_NAME} at its most physical, {B_WAGON}s and {B_MANIFEST}s and the road past the counted city'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=172 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME} names the three postings the {ROUTE_B_NAME} needs an {HERO} on before {SEASON_HARVEST}, each with its own edge of the gap: the {DEEPSTORE} watch, the {B_LEVY_BOOKS}, or the outer-{WARD} provisioning run'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='{ROUTE_B_HEAD_SURNAME}'s first lesson is a shrug at the {ROUTE_A_NAME}'s slowness; the {ROUTE_B_NAME} does not weigh, it feeds the city tonight and answers for it tomorrow, and the {DEEPSTORE}'s {GAP_QTY} gap is a thing to be handled, not contemplated'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='the {HERO} reports to the {ROUTE_B_NAME}, all motion and torchlight, where {ROUTE_B_TITLE} {ROUTE_B_HEAD_NAME} runs the {LEVY}, the watch, and the {DEEPSTORE}; the remit is spoken on the move: audit the {B_LEVY_BOOKS} and the {B_WATCH_ROLL}s, and find where the {RESOURCE} and coin actually went'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=196 beats='the {HERO} lets the {CENSUS} be ratified unchanged, reasoning the count is the count and not the clerk's to question; the inflated {ROLL} passes into another decade, the winter's cut is apportioned on phantom measures, and the {HERO}'s name stands under a number everyone now half-knows is false'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=166 beats='the {HERO} learns the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s deepest habit is deference to its own past entries; the count is inherited, not audited, and the year ends with the {HERO} understanding the shape of the silence without yet daring to break a custom older than any living {ROUTE_C_TITLE}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='an older clerk explains it almost gently: the {ROLL} is trusted precisely because it is never revised, and a chamber that started correcting its own memory would forfeit the one thing that makes its memory worth keeping'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the answer is nobody; the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s clerks certify, they do not correct, and a clerk who reaches for the founding count is reaching past every hand that trained them'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} lets the withdrawn {C_MEMO} lie and turns instead to the {CENSUS} clerks, asking who, in living memory, has ever amended the {ROLL} rather than merely certified it'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=168 beats='the {HERO} moves {ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME}'s {C_MEMO} back onto the record in open session; the {ROUTE_C_NAME} cannot un-hear it; the recurring gap becomes a matter of deliberation instead of a matter of silence, and {ROUTE_C_CLERK}'s name is on the finding that finally forces the count to be argued in the light'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=184 beats='the {HERO} slips the {C_MEMO} out beyond the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s order; it is dismissed as improperly obtained, {ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME} is blamed for the breach, and the chamber closes ranks around its procedure while the true finding drowns in the argument over how it surfaced'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=160 beats='the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s rule of order is that a suppressed paper is reintroduced only by motion, in session, on the record; to circulate it any other way is to break the very deliberation the chamber exists to protect'>>

choices.label: Reintroduce the {C_MEMO} by motion, on the record.
Circulate it quietly to force the question.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='its arithmetic is quiet and total: the {GAP_QTY} gap is not new but recurring across at least three Reckonings, each one abated and each one buried under the next'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the {HERO} pulls the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s own {C_WORKING_PAPERS} instead of waiting on the year's count, and there, misfiled among discharged drafts, is {ROUTE_C_CLERK}'s {C_MEMO}, unredacted'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=180 beats='the {HERO} takes {ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME}'s full file on the promise to move it properly and keeps that promise; the disclosure is sequenced, the {CHARTER} holds the shock, and {ROUTE_C_CLERK} is restored to the record as the one who was right and made to wait, not wrong and made to vanish'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=158 beats='the {HERO} takes {ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME}'s file and then moves it faster than promised, certain of being right; the {CHARTER} reels, the disclosure is blamed for the panic, and {ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME}, twice used, gives no {HERO} her {C_WORKING_PAPERS} ever again'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=196 beats='the {HERO} declines to be bound and works only from the public {ROLL}; the finding is thinner without {ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME}'s file but wholly the {HERO}'s own, and {ROUTE_C_CLERK} keeps her papers and her hard-won distrust intact for whoever comes after'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=166 beats='{ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME} offers her file if the {HERO} will promise to move it through the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s order and not around it; a promise, she says, is the only instrument the {ROUTE_C_NAME} truly honours, and a broken one is the only thing it never forgives'>>

choices.label: Promise to move it in order, and mean it.
Take the file and move on your own judgment.
Refuse the file rather than be bound by a promise.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='she is neither bitter nor broken, only exact, a clerk who was right at the wrong time and has decided the being-right was worth the cost, and she wants to know whether the {HERO} has decided the same'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='she has kept her full {C_WORKING_PAPERS}, every recurrence traced, and she will part with it only on a condition the {HERO} must weigh honestly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='she explains she was not silenced to bury the truth but to control its timing; {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} feared an unsequenced disclosure would shatter the {CHARTER} before it could hold the shock'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='the {HERO} seeks out {ROUTE_C_CLERK} herself, reassigned to a records annex at the cold end of the building, still certain of her arithmetic and wary of being used again'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=184 beats='the {HERO} closes the {ROLL} knowing the oldest fact in {CITY}: the shortfall was never a theft, only a lie the city was founded telling itself and has abated ever since; the truth is whole and the {HERO} is entirely unsure any chamber wants it spoken aloud'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {HERO} sits alone with the oldest page in the city and does the arithmetic no {ROUTE_C_TITLE} has dared finish, watching every subsequent count inherit the original inflation and compound it, generation upon generation, into the gap the {ROUTE_B_NAME} now hides and the {ROUTE_A_NAME} now abates'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='there it is, plain as a wound: the founding measures were never on the land, only on the parchment, an inflated count the first chambers wrote to make {CITY} larger than its fields could feed'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the {HERO} takes the founding {ROLL} down to its root alone, night after night, reading past every certified layer to the {C_CHARTER_COUNT} the city was born declaring'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=180 beats='the {HERO} edits the {WARD} counts until the {CENSUS} and the {LEVY} agree, and the gap vanishes into a clean total; the memory now lies more smoothly than before, the {HERO}'s own arithmetic the newest layer over the founding fault'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=158 beats='the {HERO} destroys the convenient reconciliation and leaves the discrepancy standing in the {ROLL}, unexplained and undeniable; nothing is solved, but nothing new is falsified, and the gap remains where the next honest reader can find it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=196 beats='the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s plainest rule is that the {ROLL} records what is counted, not what is convenient; to adjust a {WARD}'s figure to fit a total is to make the memory lie in a new and tidier hand'>>

choices.label: Adjust the {WARD} figures to close the gap.
Tear up the draft and leave the gap visible.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='it would be the easiest thing in the world and no one would ever check; the {HERO} sits with the blank correction and feels how a whole institution's dishonesty is really just this small act repeated by tired people who wanted the columns to agree'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='rather than take the finding to the chamber, the {HERO} drafts a private reconciliation reconciling the {CENSUS} to the {LEVY} by simply adjusting the {WARD}s' figures to close the gap on paper'>>

<<FILL role=setback words=174 beats='the {HERO} lays the founding over-count before the {ROUTE_A_NAME} and the {ROUTE_B_NAME} without the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s leave; the fault is aired, but so is the {HERO}'s breach of courtesy, and the {ROUTE_C_NAME} spends the {DEADLINE} defending its dignity instead of correcting its count'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=176 beats='the {HERO} keeps the finding inside the {ROUTE_C_NAME} and presses {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} to own it before the {DEADLINE}; the {ROUTE_C_TITLE} is slow and the year runs out, but the fault stays the chamber's to correct, and the {HERO} leaves the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s standing intact for the harder fight ahead'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=168 beats='the {CHARTER}'s oldest courtesy is that a chamber airs its own fault before another names it; to carry the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s failing to the {ROUTE_A_NAME} and {ROUTE_B_NAME} unbidden is to spend the chamber's standing for a moment's leverage'>>

choices.label: Carry it to the other chambers unbidden.
Keep it within the {ROUTE_C_NAME} and press {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the temptation is real: the {ROUTE_A_NAME} abates the gap and the {ROUTE_B_NAME} hides it, and here at last is the leverage to make all three own the founding lie in the same room at the same time'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {HERO} considers taking the whole finding to the other two chambers at once, over {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME}'s head, forcing all three to answer the founding count together'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=192 beats='the {HERO} carries a motion to amend the founding count to what the land yields, paired with a provision for the {WARD}s the old count fed in shadow; the {ROUTE_C_NAME}, hearing the whole of it in order, ratifies a true {ROLL} for the first time in nineteen years, and the city at last begins to believe something it can actually feed'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=172 beats='the {HERO} certifies the {CENSUS} unchanged but enters a formal note of the founding over-count into the {ROLL}; nothing is amended this year, yet the memory now carries its own correction, waiting in the record for a chamber with the nerve to act on it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='the {DEADLINE} convenes; the {CENSUS} must be ratified or amended; the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s final rule is the heaviest of all, that the {ROLL} is the city's memory and to amend it is to amend what {CITY} believes itself to be'>>

choices.label: Move to amend the {ROLL} to a true count, with provision.
Certify the {CENSUS} as-is and enter the flaw for the record.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='on the eve of the {DEADLINE} the draft sits complete, and for the first time the founding fault has a remedy attached and not merely an accusation'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the {HERO} drafts the motion the whole year has pointed toward, the true count and the provision that must ride with it, ordered and ready for the {ROLL}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='he shows the {HERO} how a founding correction, badly timed, has broken cities before; the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s slowness is scar tissue, not sloth'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME}, watching the care of it, finally trusts the {HERO} with the last of the story: the timing was always the point, and timing done right is not cowardice but the chamber's one real form of mercy'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the {HERO} holds the finding through the coldest weeks and spends them sequencing it, so that when it is spoken it lands as deliberation and not as an ambush'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=176 beats='{DEADLINE_SIGN}; the dole is cut on the {CENSUS} figure and the streets feel it; the {HERO} may press the founding over-count now, before the cut is apportioned, or hold it for the {DEADLINE} where the whole {ROLL} is heard in order'>>

choices.label: Take the finding to the other chambers now.
Hold it for the {DEADLINE}, in proper order.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} asks the {HERO}, in front of the clerks, whether a memory can be both a duty and a lie at once, and does not pretend to know the answer himself'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the chamber sits with that, and the {HERO} sees the weight the {ROUTE_C_NAME} has carried in its slowness, neither innocent nor simply guilty'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='he does not defend it so much as explain the fear beneath it, that a city told the true size of itself might not survive the telling'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} does not flinch; he confirms the founding over-count has been known and quietly managed for nineteen years, the {ABATEMENT} its downstream shadow across all three chambers'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the {HERO} lays the recurring gap before {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} and the assembled clerks and asks, on the record, what the {ROUTE_C_NAME} knew of it and when'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=180 beats='the closed {CONCLAVE} has named the {ABATEMENT}'s age aloud, about nineteen years; the {HERO} must decide how the {ROUTE_C_NAME} meets its own share of it, and the chamber's rule holds that memory is amended only by the chamber, never by one clerk acting alone'>>

choices.label: Take the founding {ROLL} down to its root yourself.
Draft a private reconciliation to close the gap.
Bring the question to {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} and the full chamber.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='it is not drift and it is not fraud in any ordinary sense; it is a single old decision reasserting itself annually, patient as erosion, and the {HERO} sees that to answer it means going all the way back to where the decision was first made'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the {HERO} requisitions the {CENSUS} tallies from the surrounding decade and lays them side by side, and the gap stands in every column like a watermark pressed into the paper at the mill'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} watches the {HERO} arrive at the edge of the old question and, for once, does not steer away from it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='the steadiness points backward, to a count that was set rather than measured, and the {HERO} feels the year begin to lean toward the founding {ROLL}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the number is too clean to be an error; a mistake would wander from year to year, and this one holds as steady as a decision someone made and keeps making'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='the {HERO} reconciles this year's {CENSUS} against the levied {RESOURCE}, {WARD} by {WARD}, and confirms the {GAP_QTY} gap is exactly as posted, neither more nor less'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=168 beats='the harvest comes in light and the {CENSUS}-{LEVY} gap is past denying; the {HERO} may audit this year's {CENSUS} against the {LEVY} in the ordinary way, or dig back into the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s suppressed {C_WORKING_PAPERS} where the pattern lives'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the {HERO} reads it twice and understands that the paper was not wrong and so had to be withdrawn; in the {ROUTE_C_NAME} a false {C_MEMO} is corrected, but a true one out of season is simply made to wait'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=160 beats='the {C_MEMO} names, in {ROUTE_C_CLERK_SURNAME}'s careful hand, every prior {DEADLINE} where the gap recurred and was abated, a private history of the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s forgetting compiled by the one clerk who refused to forget'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the {HERO} signs for it in the margin, now formally a reader of a thing the chamber tried to un-write'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='the {C_MEMO} is {ROUTE_C_CLERK}'s, and its arithmetic is unanswerable; the gap is not new, and the {ROUTE_C_NAME} has known and abated it {DEADLINE} after {DEADLINE}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the request is granted slowly, with a supervisor present, the paper handed over as a matter of record rather than a matter of rescue'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='the {HERO} files the formal request for the withdrawn {C_MEMO} and waits, learning that patience is the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s native tongue and impatience its one unforgivable accent'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=196 beats='{SEASON_LONG_LIGHT}; the {HERO} learns a junior's {C_MEMO} was pulled from circulation before {SEASON_HARVEST}; the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s rule of order governs how a withdrawn paper may be sought, and every way of reaching for it carries a different weight'>>

choices.label: Let the withdrawn {C_MEMO} lie and probe the chamber's habits.
Request the withdrawn {C_MEMO} through the proper channel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=166 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME}, passing the desk, sees which pages are open and says only that the {HERO} is reading in the right order now, which is the nearest the {ROUTE_C_TITLE} comes to a warning'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=178 beats='each year's abatement is entered in the same bloodless formula, a line so standardized it must have a template somewhere, a form for forgetting kept as carefully as any form for remembering'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=174 beats='the {HERO} turns the ratified pages back a decade and finds the same gap, smaller, quieter, always abated, never explained'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=176 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} teaches that the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s power is memory held in common, and that a count, once ratified, becomes what the city knows of itself whether or not it is true'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=168 beats='the year's numbers are orderly and the {GAP_QTY} gap sits inside them like a stone in a clear stream, undeniable and unexplained'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=184 beats='the {HERO} begins with the current {CENSUS}, learning the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s grammar of counts, {WARD}s, ratified figures, and the long habit of trusting last year's total'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=160 beats='{SEASON_SOWING}; {ROUTE_C_TITLE} {ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} sets the {HERO}'s first task and the {ROUTE_C_NAME}'s first rule with it: the {ROLL} is read in order, from the year's {CENSUS} inward, never skipping ahead to the root'>>

choices.label: Ask to see the founding {ROLL} on the very first day.
Begin with the year's {CENSUS}, as instructed.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=192 beats='the other clerks move around the {HERO} with the practiced incuriosity of people who have learned not to ask what a fresh pair of eyes might find, and the {HERO} understands the assignment is trusted precisely because auditors before have looked and then looked away'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=172 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME} introduces the founding {ROLL} from a distance, the way one introduces a difficult elder, all reverence and a quiet instruction not to disturb it; the {HERO} notes that the most guarded document in the chamber is the oldest one'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=180 beats='the {HERO} is given a desk beneath shelves that hold every count {CITY} has ever made of itself, and the sense settles in early that the answer to this year's gap is somewhere in that height, waiting to be read in order'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=158 beats='{ROUTE_C_HEAD_SURNAME}'s chamber moves at the speed of deliberation; nothing is true here until it is on the {ROLL} in proper order, and the {DEEPSTORE} gap is, to the {ROUTE_C_NAME}, first of all and last of all a question about counting'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=196 beats='the {HERO} reports to the {ROUTE_C_NAME}, all quiet and paper and the smell of old ink, where {ROUTE_C_TITLE} {ROUTE_C_HEAD_NAME} keeps the {CENSUS}, the statutes, and the founding {ROLL}; the remit is set out in full, unhurried sentences: reconcile the {CENSUS} against the {LEVY}, and account for who was counted and who was not'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=212 beats='the {THRESHOLD} of {CITY} is governed under the {CHARTER} by three chambers that hold and check one another: the {ROUTE_A_NAME} weighs and binds, the {ROUTE_B_NAME} acts and provisions, the {ROUTE_C_NAME} counts and remembers; no chamber may overrule another, and the city has kept its balance for generations by the friction between them; into this the {HERO} arrives, young, newly sworn, sent to certify one chamber through a single civic year'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=206 beats='the year opens on a fault line: the {DEEPSTORE} reconciliation shows the {CENSUS}-{LEVY} {RESOURCE} exceeding the {ROUTE_B_NAME}'s held stock by {GAP_QTY}, and the decennial {DEADLINE} waits at year's end to audit every chamber; the three chambers check and rival one another by design, and a gap none will own is exactly the kind of thing the {CHARTER} was built to survive and the kind of thing that can still break it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=196 beats='the {ASSIGNING_BODY} seconds the {HERO} for the {OPENING_MOMENT} and names the three chambers and their leads: the {ROUTE_A_NAME} under {ROUTE_A_TITLE} {ROUTE_A_HEAD_NAME}, which weighs and binds but never acts; the {ROUTE_B_NAME} under {ROUTE_B_TITLE} {ROUTE_B_HEAD_NAME}, which collects the {LEVY} and holds the {DEEPSTORE}; and the {ROUTE_C_NAME} under {ROUTE_C_TITLE} {ROUTE_C_HEAD_NAME}, which keeps the {CENSUS} and the founding {ROLL}; each offers the same year and a different door onto the {GAP_QTY} gap, and the {HERO} must choose one chamber to certify'>>

choices.label: Take the {ROUTE_A_NAME}, and learn how the city weighs its own word.
Take the {ROUTE_B_NAME}, and walk the vaults where the {RESOURCE} should be.
Take the {ROUTE_C_NAME}, and read the count the city keeps of itself.
